case_title: WONG, ARLAN MR. VS MALTER, DARIN MR. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $105.00 FILED BY WONG, ARLAN MR. AS TO DEFENDANT MALTER, DARIN MR. DEEBLE, KEVIN MR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-01-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, ARLAN MR. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MALTER, DARIN MR. DEEBLE, KEVIN MR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO DARIN MATER RETURNED ADDRESSEE UNKNOWN.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DEEBLE, KEVIN MR.
